message:
feat(ui): implement buildSnapshot() with dedup and error handling (bv-y0da)

Enhancements to BackgroundWorker.buildSnapshot():
- Add content hash dedup using analysis.ComputeDataHash()
- Skip rebuild when content is unchanged (file touched but same data)
- Add SnapshotErrorMsg for UI error notification
- Add proper logging with timing breakdown (load/analyze/total)
- Store DataHash in snapshot for external access
- Add LastHash() and ResetHash() helper methods

Also:
- Fix process() to preserve snapshot when buildSnapshot returns nil
- Add SnapshotErrorMsg handler in model.go
- Add 4 new tests for dedup functionality

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
